## Proposed changes

<!--
Describe the big picture of your changes to explain to the maintainers why this
pull request should be accepted. If it fixes a bug or resolves a feature
request, link to that issue (e.g. `Fixes #123`).
-->

## Types of changes

<!-- Put an 'x' in the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / tooling (build, CI, repository maintenance)

## Checklist

<!--
Put an 'x' in the boxes that apply. You can also complete these after opening the
PR. If you are unsure about any of them, don't hesitate to ask.
-->

- [ ] `make test` passes locally with my changes
- [ ] `make all` (mutation testing) was run where relevant
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover my change
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md` / `README.ja.md`) where needed
- [ ] All code comments and documentation are written in English

## How to verify
